flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at Southern University at Shreveport vs the 2003–2007 baseline (7.2% vs 18.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern University at Shreveport fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern University at Shreveport fell 40% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $5.0k).
